name: safari.bookmarks
title: Safari:Bookmarks
description: The declaration to configure managed bookmarks in Safari.

payloadkeys.title: Managed Bookmarks
payloadkeys.content: A dictionary that specifies a set of managed bookmarks.

subkeys.content: A string that specifies the unique identifier for this group of managed bookmarks. Safari displays a separate managed bookmarks item for each set of unique managed bookmarks based on the value of this key. If multiple active configurations use the same value for this key, Safari displays a single group formed by merging the list of `Bookmarks` from each group.

subkeys.title: The name of the bookmarks folder.
subkeys.content: The name of the bookmarks folder. Safari uses this as the title for the top-level managed bookmarks item.

subkeys.title: Bookmarks
subkeys.content: A list of bookmarks. Either a `URL` or `Folder` key must be present in each item.
A bookmark that specifies a title, and either a URL for the bookmark, or a nested folder of bookmarks.

subkeys.title: Title
subkeys.content: The title of the bookmark shown in Safari.

subkeys.title: URL
subkeys.content:
The URL for the bookmark item.

Only one of `URL` or `Folder` must be present.

subkeys.title: Folder
subkeys.content:
An array of bookmarks for each bookmark in the folder. Folders can include bookmark items and bookmark folders.

Only one of `URL` or `Folder` must be present.
A bookmark that specifies a title, and either a URL for the bookmark, or a nested folder of bookmarks.
